clearStatesDesc: Reset the concatenation state of all documents to "off". This action is irreversible, please use with caution.
clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all document concatenation states? This action cannot be undone.
clearFail: Clear failed, check the console log
maxLevelDesc: Maximum level of subdocuments to concatenate, max is {maxLevel}
maxCountDesc: Limit the maximum number of concatenated subdocuments, max is {maxCount}
maxCountReached: Exceeded max count {count}, only the first {count} are shown.
floatingEditButtonTopDistanceDesc: Distance from the top of the screen to show the floating edit button, in pixels. min is {minDistance}px, max is {maxDistance}px.
floatingEditButtonBottomDistanceDesc: Distance from the bottom of the screen to show the floating edit button, in pixels. min is {minDistance}px, max is {maxDistance}px.
floatingEditButtonDirectionDesc: Direction of the floating edit button, can be "left" or "right".
showSubDocTitleDesc: Show subdocument title in the concatenated document, default is on.
